Get Started
Claude for Real Estate

List More, Follow Up Better,
Close Faster.

Top-producing agents and teams don't have time to write everything by hand. Claude handles listing descriptions, follow-up sequences, market reports, and content — so you can focus on clients and closings.

Get Claude Implemented → How It Works
The real estate production problem

You're in the relationship business.
Manual production work is stealing your time.

🏠
Listing descriptions take forever
Every listing needs a unique, compelling description. You know what to say — writing it from scratch every time is what takes the hour.
📧
Follow-up sequences are inconsistent
Buyer and seller follow-up depends on whoever has time. There's no system — just a mix of good intentions and dropped balls.
📊
Market reports are manual
Monthly market updates are a full afternoon of pulling data, writing commentary, and formatting. They get skipped more than they get sent.
📱
Social content is sporadic
You know you should be posting consistently. The content ideas are there — the time to write and schedule them isn't.
What Claude handles

Six high-leverage Claude workflows
for real estate businesses.

01
Listing Description Generation
Feed Claude the property details and it writes a compelling listing description — MLS format, full narrative, or both — in minutes. Consistent quality across every listing.
02
Buyer & Seller Follow-Up Sequences
Multi-touch follow-up sequences for buyers, sellers, and past clients — built by Claude, personalized by stage, running automatically in your CRM.
03
Market Update Newsletters
Claude turns your market data into a readable, engaging monthly newsletter your sphere actually opens — drafted fast, sent consistently.
04
Offer Summary Documents
Structured offer comparison summaries for your sellers — Claude organizes the key terms into a clean side-by-side your clients can actually read.
05
Neighborhood Guides
Evergreen neighborhood content for your website and buyer packets — schools, walkability, local amenities, market stats — drafted by Claude and updated as things change.
06
Social Media Content Calendar
A month of posts drafted at once — listings, market stats, tips, testimonials — so you're not staring at a blank caption box every morning.
How it works

Audit. Build. Optimize.

Three steps from scattered manual production to Claude running your content and communication engine.

1
AI Audit — $1,500
We map where your time goes and where Claude creates the most leverage for your business. You get a clear, prioritized plan. Learn about the Audit →
2
Implementation — from $3,500
We build the Claude workflows, prompts, and systems your team will actually use — integrated with your CRM and existing tools. See Implementation details →
3
Retainer — $1,200/mo
Ongoing optimization as your market shifts and your team grows. New workflows added, existing ones refined. Retainer details →
Start with an AI Audit → Claude for Small Business →
